channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Research leading to U.S. export restrictions on top Anthropic models was for defense, cybersecurity CEO says
item.description: It was Defense Oriented Prompting (DOP), capabilities defenders need.

item.title: The real star of the UFC fight at the White House may be the Claw: a behemoth cage constructed for the Octagon
item.description: The mixed martial arts show on Sunday night streaming on Paramount+ is timed for Trump's 80th birthday and the celebration of the nation's 250th anniversary.

item.title: Trump says he will sign deal with Iran to reopen Hormuz Sunday
item.description: Trump also said Iran would not receive any money in the deal, a key sticking point during Pakistan-mediated negotiations.

item.title: Trump to discuss Strait of Hormuz mine removal with G7 allies as Iran deal nears
item.description: Britain and France have shown interest in helping clear the waterway once the conflict pauses.
